text: Hello? Hello. Hello. Hey. Good evening. My name is Alyssa. I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Georgia State Relief Program. So far, have you received any updates or notifications about this yet? Yes. Oh, okay, great. So the notification has all the details, and I just want to help you get everything processed. You're enrolled in both Part A and Part B, aren't you?
